results.rendered_html: ghāṇṭika m. (fr. ghaṇṭā) a bell-ringer, strolling ballad-singer who carries a bell, bard who sings in chorus (esp. in honour of the gods) ringing a bell in presence of the images,  MBh. xiii, 6028 ;  VarBṛS. x, 6  and 12
